name: Boston Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Drain and cover with fresh water.
3. Bring to a boil, then simmer until tender. Drain again.
4. Pour half of the beans into a baking pot.
5. Combine the remaining ingredients and add to the pot.
6. Pour in the remaining beans.
7. Cover with boiling water and bake for 8 hours at 250 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Watch the dish occasionally and add more water if necessary.
